scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace web/app"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web/app && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint:eslint-tooling: eslint eslint.tooling.config.mjs eslint.scenario.config.mjs playwright.config.ts contract scripts --config eslint.tooling.config.mjs --max-warnings 0
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint-web && npm run lint:stylelint && npm run lint:eslint-server && npm run lint:eslint-scenario && npm run lint:eslint-tooling
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @bluetasks/app && npm run test --workspace @bluetasks/server
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace @bluetasks/app && npm run test:coverage --workspace @bluetasks/server
scripts.test:coverage:gate: npm run test:coverage:gate --workspace @bluetasks/app && npm run test:coverage:gate --workspace @bluetasks/server
scripts.semgrep:docker: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/src" -w /src semgrep/semgrep sh -c 'semgrep scan --config p/typescript --config p/react --error web/app && semgrep scan --config p/typescript --error server contract scenario scripts playwright.config.ts eslint.tooling.config.mjs eslint.scenario.config.mjs'
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run duplicates && npm run test:coverage:gate && npm run build && npm run test:scenario
scripts.package:docker: npm run build && npm run docker:prepare
scripts.desktop:prep: npm run build && npm run desktop:assemble-runtime && npm run desktop:fetch-node
